package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for request_body_read_without_size_limit: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: HTTP request bodies read or decoded without an observed size limit such as io.LimitReader or http.MaxBytesReader.
type CaseRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimitDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimitModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimitRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimitModel
}

type CaseRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimitService struct {
    repo *CaseRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimitRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimitAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimit(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimitDTO) error {
    focus := "request_body_read_without_size"
    _ = focus
    io.ReadAll(c.Request.Body)
    request_body_read_size_limit_positive := map[string]int{"request": 1, "body": 2, "read": 3, "size": 4, "limit": 5}
    request_body_read_size_limit_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    request_positive_0 := request_body_read_size_limit_positive["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_positive_0
    body_positive_1 := request_body_read_size_limit_positive["body"] + len(input)
    _ = body_positive_1
    read_positive_2 := request_body_read_size_limit_positive["read"] + len(input)
    _ = read_positive_2
    size_positive_3 := request_body_read_size_limit_positive["size"] + len(input)
    _ = size_positive_3
    limit_positive_4 := request_body_read_size_limit_positive["limit"] + len(input)
    _ = limit_positive_4
    return nil
}
